Interface MathMLBvarElement

All Superinterfaces:
Element, MathMLContainer, MathMLContentContainer, MathMLContentElement, MathMLElement, Node
All Known Implementing Classes:
MathMLBvarElementImpl
public interface MathMLBvarElement extends MathMLContentContainer
This interface represents the MathML MathMLBvarElement element.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
